scripts.build: tsc && npm run prepare-assets && vite build
scripts.test: npm run prepare-copc-wasm && node --import tsx --test test/*.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: npm run prepare-copc-wasm && node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage test/*.test.mjs
scripts.prepare-assets: npm run prepare-copc-wasm && npm run prepare-laz-perf
